description: CompositionGrey and blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short raglan sleeves, branding at the back neck, graphic print on the front and vented hemFittingRegularWash careMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, but do not iron directly on print/embroideryIf you are a true avionics fan and love to soar like a free bird through the skies, then this Aviators Air Crew t-shirt from basics is perfect for you. The blue body with grey raglan sleeves oozes immense style and attitude, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this T-shirt with shorts or jeans and floaters for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
